title: Penmai Konda Mounam Song Lyrics Kadhal Geetham
stanzas:
Penmai Konda Mounam Song Lyrics Kadhal Geetham
#Ilaiyaraja

oadi vandhu maalai
poda thaeduthu maranam.
pesa vaendum orey tharam.

Manam konda kadhal
enn saabamo.
uyir konda kadhal
en paavamo.

ullam thaangavillai
azhudhen mella
kanneer thuligal
undhan peyar solla

yaarodum nee vazhalaam
unnodu naan vazhgiren
adi ennaalil
en jeevan pogum

maaradhu en vedhanai
vazhvodu yaen sodhanai
anbuthaan yaedum
en moga gaanam.

oadi vandhu maalai
poda thaeduthu maranam.
pesa vaendum orey tharam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Penmai Konda Mounam expresses the emotions of love and longing, portraying the silence that often accompanies deep feelings.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kadhal Geetham, this song reflects the protagonist's inner feelings and struggles related to love and relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB and composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Penmai Konda Mounam was released on December 28, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Penmai Konda Mounam, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the complexities of love. The song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of silence and longing that often accompany deep affection. Set against the backdrop of Kadhal Geetham, it serves as a poignant reminder of the bittersweet nature of relationships. With SPB's mesmerizing vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this melody evokes a sense of nostalgia and heartfelt emotion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penmai Konda Mounam from the Kadhal Geetham is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the legendary SPB's soulful voice and Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this classic and let its soothing vibes transport you to a world of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Even if silence holds the truth of femininity, it still resides in the heart.
When the evening comes, death seeks to take away the garland. Words must be spoken, just one way.
Even if silence holds the truth of femininity, it still resides in the heart.
What is love that holds the heart? Is it a blessing that holds life?
The heart cannot bear it, I cry softly, let your tears speak your name.
You can live with anyone, but I live with you. If I lose you, my life will end.
Even if silence holds the truth of femininity, it still resides in the heart.
What is the truth of my body? What is the memory of our love?
There is no light in my eyes, there is no path for my feet.
My pain does not change, why should I test it? Love is my only song.
Even if silence holds the truth of femininity, it still resides in the heart.
When the evening comes, death seeks to take away the garland. Words must be spoken, just one way.
Even if silence holds the truth of femininity, it still resides in the heart.
